seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Baudin Beach and Bay Of Shoals. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Baudin Beach vs Bay Of Shoals: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Baudin Beach and Bay Of Shoals.
heading: Baudin Beach vs Bay Of Shoals — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Baudin Beach, South Australia and Bay Of Shoals, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bay Of Shoals has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Baudin Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Baudin Beach or Bay Of Shoals safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Baudin Beach has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Bay Of Shoals scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Baudin Beach scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Bay Of Shoals scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Baudin Beach or Bay Of Shoals?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bay Of Shoals has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
